subject: CIR.NO. 301- New additions in the Senior School Library
body:
[image: logo1.jpg]

*          SRI SATHYA SAI VIDYA VIHAR*

          Scheme No. 54, A B Road, INDORE (MP) 452010

                    CBSE School No. : 50056,   CBSE Affiliation No.1030023
                  E-mail: sai@sathyasaiindore.com <sai@sathyasaiindore.com>
     Ph: 0731-2553023

*CIR.NO.SSSVV/2025-26/301
                         Date: 5th January, 202**6*





Dear Parents


Sai Ram!


We are pleased to inform you that we are adding new books to our School
Library to enhance students? reading habits. The new collection is suitable
for different age groups.

Students are encouraged to visit the library regularly and make good use of
these books. We request parents to motivate their children to develop a
habit of reading.


 The list of the new books added has been attached herewith for your
reference.

  Thank you for your continued support.



 Happy reading!!!





With Best Regards







Dr. Anju Chopra

Principal

Email ? *principal@sathyasaiindore.com <principal@sathyasaiindore.com>*
Website ? *www.sathyasaiindore.com <http://www.sathyasaiindore.com/>*
